summary.text: 소방 호스를 조준해 모든 불꽃을 끄고 하루를 구하세요.
Aim your fire hose and put out every flame to save the day.

meta.theme: A brave little firefighter aims a hose stream at playful flames popping up around a building

cast.description: A neutral runtime guide rendered without a character asset.

items.text: 소방서 종이 울려요! 불꽃이 하나둘 나타나요. 호스를 잡고 출동해요!
The fire station bell is ringing! Flames are popping up — grab your hose!
팔로 불꽃을 조준하고, 불이 꺼질 때까지 물줄기를 가만히 유지해요.
Point your arm at each flame and hold the stream on it until it goes out.
잘하고 있어요! 팔로 불꽃을 조준하고, 불이 꺼질 때까지 물줄기를 유지해요.
Point your arm at each flame and hold the stream on it until it goes out.
모든 불꽃을 껐어요! 진정한 소방수 물줄기 영웅이에요.
Every flame is out! You are a true Fire Hose Hero.

alt.text: 소방서 마당에서 호스 물줄기가 작은 불꽃들을 향해 시원하게 뻗어가는 그림
A fire hose sends a sweeping blue stream toward small flames in a fire-station courtyard

provenance.prompt:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: original 16:9 landscape hero bitmap for the Fire Hose Hero browser motion game
Primary request: Create an energetic, friendly firefighting game illustration: a sturdy fire hose nozzle in the lower foreground launches a sweeping arc of cool blue water toward a cluster of small playful ember-shaped flames around a simple fire-station courtyard, with the water visibly calming and shrinking the flames. Convey aim-from-a-distance play without showing a person or child.
Scene/backdrop: cinematic but welcoming fire-station courtyard at dusk, simplified architecture, layered atmospheric depth, no emergency panic
Subject: bold curved water stream, hose nozzle, expressive non-character flame shapes, droplets and gentle steam where water meets embers
Style/medium: premium stylized editorial game illustration, softly textured gouache with crisp modern forms, original visual language, suitable for a family-friendly active game
Composition/framing: exact 16:9 horizontal composition; water arc creates a strong diagonal from lower foreground toward the flame cluster; keep key subjects within safe center area for responsive cropping; clean perimeter; no UI panels
Lighting/mood: courageous, playful, controlled, reassuring rather than dangerous; luminous water highlights and warm ember glow
Color palette: deep ember red and rust (#9E2F25, #C94732), cool water blue and navy (#2D8FAE, #0E4055), warm cream (#FFF3D6); accessible high-contrast separation; avoid neon colors
Materials/textures: tactile paper grain, painted water droplets, soft steam, matte illustration finish
Constraints: original generated art only; no recognizable copyrighted characters; no public figures; no children; no photorealistic people; absolutely no words, letters, numbers, signage, logos, trademarks, interface elements, borders, or watermark; no injury, smoke danger, destruction, weapons, fear, or unsafe movement
Avoid: photorealism, generic 3D render, clip art, gradients that reduce contrast, busy clutter, baked-in text
